choose.when:
SELECT sw.id, sw.name, sw.type, sw.strength, sw.weakness, sw.write_thumbnail AS writeThumbnail, sw.created_at, sw.updated_at, COALESCE(SUM(st.duration_in_seconds), 0) AS totalDuration, c.name AS categoryName FROM skill_write AS sw LEFT JOIN category AS c ON c.name = sw.category_name AND sw.category_name IS NOT NULL LEFT JOIN study_time AS st ON st.category_id = c.id WHERE sw.type IN
#{type}
GROUP BY sw.id, sw.name, sw.type, sw.strength, sw.weakness, sw.write_thumbnail, sw.created_at, sw.updated_at, c.name ORDER BY totalDuration
ASC DESC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT sw.id, sw.name, sw.type, sw.strength, sw.weakness, sw.write_thumbnail AS writeThumbnail, sw.created_at, sw.updated_at, COALESCE(SUM(st.duration_in_seconds), 0) AS totalDuration, c.name AS categoryName FROM skill_write AS sw LEFT JOIN category AS c ON c.name = sw.category_name LEFT JOIN study_time AS st ON st.category_id = c.id
AND sw.type IN
#{type}
GROUP BY sw.id, sw.name, sw.type, sw.strength, sw.weakness, sw.write_thumbnail, sw.created_at, sw.updated_at, c.name ORDER BY
sw.created_at
ASC DESC
